item.title: LogicGrid 10.1.0
item.description:
LogicGrid 10.1.0

What's New

  • Three grid color presets: Light, Dark, Custom — touch any setting and it auto-saves as Custom

Changed

  • Bottom strip detection anchored from top of ruler — fixes detection issues for users with secondary ruler enabled
  • Removed adaptive line color feature (replaced by explicit Light/Dark presets)

Fixed

  • Phantom bar lines at extreme zoom when only one bar was detected

Improved

  • Bug report screenshot captures dev overlay info automatically
  • Dev overlay layout no longer truncates ruler height value
